messages.content:
Here is a list of WWE Superstars. List in Parenthesis after their name, all the Tag Teams each Wrestler has been in, including names of Tag members in Sub parenthesis, divided by commas. Be Detailed and include every tag team over a wrestlers career. Make Every WWE Superstar on their own line. Don’t include bullet points, dashes or number the list. The format should be: WWE Superstar (Tag Tam Name - (Tag Team Members), Tag Tam Name - (Tag Team Members), etc.) The List of Superstars is as follows: Natalya
Nathan Frazer
Nikki Cross
Nikkita Lyons
Noam Dar
Odyssey Jones
Omos
Oro Mensah
Otis
Pat McAfee

Natalya (The Hart Dynasty - (Tyson Kidd, David Hart Smith), Total Divas - (Brie Bella, Eva Marie, Cameron, Naomi), Fire & Desire - (Mandy Rose, Sonya Deville))
Nathan Frazer (None)
Nikki Cross (SAnitY - (Eric Young, Alexander Wolfe, Killian Dain))
Nikkita Lyons (None)
Noam Dar (British Ambition - (Nevil, Oliver Grey))
Odyssey Jones (None)
Omos (AJ Styles and Omos - (AJ Styles))
Oro Mensah (None)
Otis (Heavy Machinery - (Tucker))
Pat McAfee (None)

Create a long and detailed list of all the distinct areas that make up a modern WWE wrestling arena. For example: loading docks, announcer's tables, Balcony seats, rafters, Male Wrestler dressing rooms, entrance ramp, consessions etc. Group entries together based on their relevancy to each other. Make the list have at least a hundred items. Each area should be on it's own row.

1. Lobby
2. Box office
3. Ticketing booths
4. Will call area
5. Merchandise stands
6. Concession stands
7. Fast food outlets
8. Bars
9. First aid stations
10. Restrooms
11. VIP and Premium seating
12. Balcony seating
13. Terrace level seating
14. Lower level seating
15. Floor level seating
16. Press area
17. Photographer's pit
18. Announcer's tables
19. Timekeepers table
20. Broadcast tables
21. Interview sets
22. Medical area
23. Locker room area
24. Male talent dressing rooms
25. Female talent dressing rooms
26. Production offices
27. Production control room
28. On-air sales suite
29. Production trucks
30. Satellite uplink trucks
31. Production facilities
32. Lighting grids
33. Spotlight towers
34. Stage rigging
35. Entrance ramp
36. WWE TitanTron
37. WWE video screen
38. Pyrotechnic areas
39. Smoke machines
40. Fog machines
41. Lighting control booth
42. Sound control booth
43. Digital signage
44. Scoreboards
45. LED screens
46. Jumbotron
47. VIP lounges
48. Executive offices
49. Sky boxes
50. VIP reception areas
51. Private suites
52. Press conference rooms
53. Green rooms
54. Network studios
55. Helicopter landing pads
56. Loading docks
57. Parking garage
58. Underground tunnel system
59. Security checkpoints
60. Walkthrough metal detectors
61. Bag search stations
62. Metal detection wands
63. Crowd control barriers
64. Stanchions
65. Rope and carpet runners
66. Security and ushers stations
67. Ticket scanners
68. TV camera positions
69. Backstage hallway areas
70. Catering services
71. Dressing room attendants
72. Makeup and hair stations
73. Catering trucks
74. Janitorial services
75. Maintenance areas
76. Housekeeping services
77. Escalators
78. Elevators
79. Loading bay doors
80. Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning system
81. Emergency exits
82. Fire alarms
83. Sprinkler system
84. Fire suppression system
85. Emergency lighting
86. Backup power supply
87. Uninterruptible power supply
88. Electrical wiring and outlets
89. Soundproof walls
90. Acoustical ceiling tiles
91. Illuminated signs
